title: WOKE FAST FOOD WORKER FIRED AFTER REFUSING TO SERVE TRUMP SUPPORTER!
description:
Jeremy from The Quartering reacts to a viral confrontation in Ann Arbor, Michigan, where Smoothie King employees were filmed refusing service to a couple because the husband was wearing a Donald Trump sweatshirt.

#TheQuartering #SmoothieKing #Trump2024 #CultureWar #Discrimination #ViralControversy #MichiganNews #PoliticalCommentary #GoBroke #RetailDrama
